finding: Tree carbon storage is expected to be right-skewed.
business_meaning: A smaller share of larger trees may represent a disproportionately high share of standing carbon value.
modelling_implication: Consider log transformation or robust/non-linear models.

finding: Diameter is expected to be strongly associated with carbon storage.
business_meaning: Tree size is central to carbon-aware harvesting and conservation review.
modelling_implication: Include DIA and engineered size features such as DIA_squared.

finding: Height and actual height may provide additional structural information.
business_meaning: Trees with similar diameter may differ in carbon storage depending on vertical structure.
modelling_implication: Include HT/ACTUALHT where missingness is manageable.

finding: Species, forest type and geography show potential differences in carbon storage.
business_meaning: Carbon planning should consider ecological and regional context, not only individual tree size.
modelling_implication: Treat SPCD, FORTYPCD and STATECD as categorical predictors.

finding: Remaining missing values exist in some non-essential predictors.
business_meaning: Some useful inventory variables are incomplete but may still improve predictions.
modelling_implication: Use imputation or missing indicators in final preprocessing.
